creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Check out Arrazuna at One&Only One Za‘abeel.

This upscale food and retail hall is located in the world’s longest cantilever; a suspended culinary venue called The Link.

🌇 Great views of Dubai Frame, Burj Khalifa and Downtown
☕️ Prices are on the higher end, as expected. We spent 150 AED for 2 lattes and 1 lamachun. 
💙 Don’t miss to visit the pool deck while you’re there. If you’re up for a drink and Nikkei cuisine, Tapasake outdoor lounge is the place to be at! 

Who will you bring here? Tag them in the comments! 

Dubai • Dubai Hotel • Dubai Restaurant • Where to go in Dubai • Lady and her Sweet Escapes
